html: What TCRO looks like in mixed-use and office portfolios
text: What TCRO looks like in mixed-use and office portfolios

html: In office and mixed-use properties, TCRO usually concentrates in:
text: In office and mixed-use properties, TCRO usually concentrates in:

html: Business interruption when core systems fail (HVAC, elevators, access, water)
text: Business interruption when core systems fail (HVAC, elevators, access, water)

html: Utility costs, especially in older assets with leaks and inefficient systems
text: Utility costs, especially in older assets with leaks and inefficient systems

html: Insurance premiums and deductibles on larger schedules
text: Insurance premiums and deductibles on larger schedules

html: Governance and reporting overhead for investors, lenders, and ESG commitments
text: Governance and reporting overhead for investors, lenders, and ESG commitments

html: Failures can translate into:
text: Failures can translate into:

html: Tenants unable to occupy space or operate businesses
text: Tenants unable to occupy space or operate businesses

html: Emergency repairs and overtime
text: Emergency repairs and overtime

html: Disputes and concessions that affect NOI
text: Disputes and concessions that affect NOI

html: Tougher conversations at renewal and with lenders
text: Tougher conversations at renewal and with lenders

html: Typical pattern when you connect building data to TCRO
text: Typical pattern when you connect building data to TCRO

html: When you treat building data as a financial asset and connect it to TCRO, you tend to see:
text: When you treat building data as a financial asset and connect it to TCRO, you tend to see:

html: Fewer unplanned outages through predictive maintenance
text: Fewer unplanned outages through predictive maintenance

html: Lower energy and water spend through leak detection and better controls
text: Lower energy and water spend through leak detection and better controls

html: Clearer justification for modernization projects with both ESG and TCRO returns
text: Clearer justification for modernization projects with both ESG and TCRO returns

html: Insurance and financing conversations that are based on evidence, not just disclosure
text: Insurance and financing conversations that are based on evidence, not just disclosure

html: This is where Make Data Pay: Turning Building Risk Data into a Financial Asset and From ESG Reporting to TCRO intersect.
text: This is where Make Data Pay: Turning Building Risk Data into a Financial Asset and From ESG Reporting to TCRO intersect [links to /blog/make-building-data-pay and /blog/esg-to-tcro-sustainability-risk-advantage].

html: How to quantify mixed-use and office TCRO ROI for your own portfolio
text: How to quantify mixed-use and office TCRO ROI for your own portfolio

html: Two steps:
text: Two steps:

html: Build a segmented TCRO view. Use the TCRO calculator to model TCRO for office and mixed-use segments separately, with special attention to outages and utilities.
text: Build a segmented TCRO view. Use the TCRO calculator to model TCRO for office and mixed-use segments separately, with special attention to outages and utilities [link to /tcro#calculator].

html: Get a one-day estimate for a flagship asset. Use Estimate Your Savings for one key office tower or mixed-use property to understand what predictive operations and better risk data could change in that specific building’s TCRO profile.
text: Get a one-day estimate for a flagship asset. Use Estimate Your Savings for one key office tower or mixed-use property to understand what predictive operations and better risk data could change in that specific building’s TCRO profile [link to /tcro/estimate-your-savings].
